'''Daxis Outpost''' was a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] research installation that was located in the [[Jandolhoon system/Legends|Jandolhoon system]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. The outpost was used by the [[Bureau of Scouting and Exploration Services]] as a staging ground for expeditions into the [[Galactic Rim/Legends|Galactic Rim]]. [[Doctor/Legends|Doctor]] [[Maxina Sensis]] was the Daxis Outpost's [[Chief Researcher]].
